meta.title: Front Porch Web, LLC — Websites Built on Trust
meta.description: Front Porch Web builds custom, mobile-friendly websites for businesses, adoptive families, and student-athletes. Honest prices, no surprises.

hero.sub: Custom, mobile-friendly sites for businesses, adoptive families, and student-athletes. Honest prices, no surprises.

values.title: Built around your story

work.heading: Explore sample websites.
work.sub: These examples demonstrate the style and quality you can expect while we build our client portfolio.

process.heading: Up and running in three easy steps.

steps.title: Fill out our questionnaire
steps.body: Answer a few quick questions and upload your photos. No tech experience is needed, just tell us your story.

steps.title: We build your site
steps.body: We build a custom website with modern tools and techniques. You will see a preview before anything goes live.

steps.title: Review & launch
steps.body: Once you are happy with it, we publish and make sure everything runs fast and reliably.

pricing.heading: Honest prices. No surprises.
pricing.sub: Final pricing depends on your project type. 50% due upfront, 50% due on completion, before your site goes live.

tiers.name: Starter
features: Contact form so customers can reach you

tiers.name: Premium
features: All the sections your story needs

hosting.heading: Hosting & Care Plan
hosting.intro: Every site needs a home and a domain name. After your site launches, you choose:
hosting.note: Small updates means text and photo changes. New pages or a redesign are quoted separately.

options.name: Take it with you
features: We'll help you set up your own hosting and domain
The site is yours to run

options.name: Let us handle it
features: Hosting, your domain, and keeping your site online
Small updates (text and photo changes) whenever you need them
Cancel anytime — we'll hand the site over to you, or take it offline

about.heading: Websites Built on Trust
about.photoAlt: Sean, founder of Front Porch Web
about.body: Hi, I am Sean, a high school junior studying aviation and someone who loves learning about flight and technology. Being part of an adoptive family, I have heard about how much time and effort my mom put into building a website as we were waiting to grow our family. Hearing this story, along with my own love of technology, inspired me to create a platform where families and small organizations can more easily and economically share stories online.
about.body2: I named it Front Porch because a front porch is where neighbors stop by, stories get shared, and trust is built one honest conversation at a time. That's how I want to work with you. You'll see the site before it goes live, you'll know the price before you commit, and you can always just ask me a question and get a straight answer. Whether you run a local business, are growing your family, or are a student chasing a goal, I'd be honored to help you tell your story well.

cta.heading: Ready to tell your story?
cta.body: Fill out the questionnaire, upload your photos, and see a full preview before anything goes live.
